scope: trading research, paper execution, live-readiness, and operator-safety subsystem

machine_may: write local paper and review records
send or prepare operator notifications where configured
machine_must: keep paper and live paths separate
treat readiness and approval records as evidence, not automatic execution permission
machine_must_not: enable live execution flags without an explicit approved phase
disable the kill switch without explicit approval
call Binance order endpoints without explicit authorization
convert paper/operator visibility into live approval
bypass exact phrase, hash-chain, or human review requirements

operator_authority.authority_boundary: Operator records can satisfy review prerequisites, but they do not by themselves enable live execution or place orders.

market_reality: read-only exchange metadata when explicitly allowed
execution_reality: future explicit live connector attempts only after all gates

execution_boundaries.paper: local paper positions and paper execution ledgers
execution_boundaries.dry_run: validation and payload preview without live order placement
execution_boundaries.live_stub: records rejected live attempt metadata and places no order
execution_boundaries.live: requires explicit future/live gates, exact approvals, safe flags, risk contracts, protective readiness, and connector readiness
